creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 148831
update

rinse_3.0.6 was released a few days ago, only touches centos[67]. No conflict with current patches/sed(1) lines. Tested by populating centos7 chroot and installing firefox within it and

https://trillian.chruetertee.ch/freebsd-gecko/browser/trunk/www/linux-c6-freshplayerplugin

(In reply to John Marino from bug 193493 comment #11)
> I decided to just use <pre> and <post> to save a file.
> I hope that's ok.

OPSYS is defined earlier, in bsd.port.options.mk.
